summary: Planned a non-mutating contributor-branch repair for open PR #77539. The preflight artifact shows #77539 is the only hydrated item, open, non-security-sensitive, maintainer-editable, and useful; current main at 5372c7146bb2b6014fc3a25139cf4c63a6087d45 still lacks the task override in the replacement/reactivation paths, so a narrow repair remains warranted before any PR update or merge decision.

actions.reason: #77539 is the canonical useful contributor PR, but it still needs an executor repair pass on the contributor branch plus fresh focused validation, pnpm check:changed, git diff --check, and Codex /review before it can be updated or considered for merge.
The executor should repair and validate the existing contributor PR branch, preserving @amittell's authorship and PR history.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing contributor PR branch for #77539 so replacement subagent runs persist the actual steered, wake, orphan-recovery, and completed-session follow-up task text that restart redispatch later wraps from the stored run task. Also resolve the stale Copilot comment references and rerun focused validation plus the repo changed gate.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(subagent): preserve steered task text on restart redispatch
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Summary:
- Repair the existing #77539 contributor branch so subagent replacement records can persist caller-supplied task text for steer, wake, orphan recovery, and completed-session follow-up redispatch.
- Keep restart orphan recovery replaying the canonical stored run task, with the replacement path updating that stored task only when a trimmed replacement task is supplied.
- Resolve the stale Copilot inline feedback about non-existent redispatchSubagentRunAfterRestart references, or prove those comments are already obsolete on the repaired head.

Credit:
- Based on and preserving @amittell's source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77539.

Verification:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.steer-restart.test.ts src/gateway/session-subagent-reactivation.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.send-followup-status.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check
- Codex /review clean before any merge recommendation
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @amittell as the author of https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77539.
Keep the PR body release-note context rather than editing CHANGELOG.md, which is release-owned in this repo.
Before update, verify the branch head is still 50eefdf243a1a216cd375abc1c4e15554dc54d8b or re-evaluate any newer author changes instead of overwriting them.
